  AI Document Assistant Notes  



This   file   has		irregular   whitespace and DISTINCTIVE_TXT_MARKER.




Line 0: The AI Document Assistant lets a user upload documents and converse with an assistant that answers questions using only the content of those documents, grounding every answer in retrieved passages.
